title: Republic Services' San Diego-Area Compost Facility Named Industry's Best
text: National Waste & Recycling Association award recognizes Otay Compost Facility's innovative and sustainable approach to organics diversion PHOENIX , Aug. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The National Waste & Recycling Association recently named Republic Services' Otay Compost Facility the 2022 Organics Management Facility of the Year, celebrating its innovative approach to organics diversion. title: Republic Services Is Well-Positioned To Ride Out Inflationary Pressures
text: Republic Services has a "moaty" business model with an incredibly stable cash flow profile and bright growth outlook. Its ~$2.2 billion acquisition of US Ecology in May 2022 should unlock material synergies going forward.

title: Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) CEO Jon Vander Ark on Q2 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 4, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Aaron Evans - Vice President of Investor Relations Jon Vander Ark - President and CEO Brian DelGhiaccio - EVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Toni Kaplan - Morgan Stanley Walter Spracklin - RBC Capital Markets Jerry Revich - Goldman Sachs Hamzah Mazari - Jefferies Michael Hoffman - Stifel Sean Eastman - KeyBanc Capital Markets Michael Calleja - Bank of America Tyler Brown - Raymond James Stephanie Yee - JPMorgan Noah Kaye - Oppenheimer Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Republic Services' Second Quarter 2022 Investor Conference Call. Republic Services is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol RSG.

title: Republic Services (RSG) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Republic Services (RSG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 11.86% and 2.50%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Republic Services, Inc. Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: Second Quarter Total Revenue Growth of 21 Percent Reported Earnings Per Share of $1.17 Increased Adjusted Earnings Per Share 21 Percent Over the Prior Year to $1.32 Generated Cash Flow from Operations of $1,563 million and Adjusted Free Cash Flow of $1,152 million for the Six Months Ended June 30, 2022 Raised 2022 Full-Year Financial Guidance Increased Quarterly Dividend by Approximately 8 Percent PHOENIX , Aug. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) today reported net income of $371.9 million, or $1.17 per diluted share, for the three months ended June 30, 2022, versus $331.1 million, or $1.03 per diluted share, for the comparable 2021 period. Excluding certain benefits and expenses, on an adjusted basis, net income for the three months ended June 30, 2022 was $418.4 million, or $1.32 per diluted share, versus $349.9 million, or $1.09 per diluted share, for the comparable 2021 period.
